title: BEM-847 execute after 846
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:20 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem846_verify_real_response_after_845.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if ps=='real_claude_response_found':
    status='process_response_ready'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and produce agreed protocol'
elif ps=='real_response_missing_queue_empty':
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem847_real_response_required_retry.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-847 | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE REQUIRED RETRY'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: write a real response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem847_claude_response.md.'+sep+'Must include literal marker: CLAUDE RESPONSE.'+sep+'Must include Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED.'+sep+'Must address: multi-agent architecture/protocol agreement and why previous response was missing.'+sep+'Do not write blocker placeholder. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem847_real_response_dispatch_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-847 queue empty but real response missing; retry Claude dispatcher','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files=[str(mail),str(q)]
    status='real_response_retry_created'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify response'
elif ps=='real_response_missing_queue_still_pending':
    status='queue_pending_needs_processor_fix'
    next_action='inspect queue remaining and processor result files; fix unprocessed queue item'
else:
    status='unknown_after_bem846'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-846 status '+ps
state={'bem':'BEM-847','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem847_execute_after_bem846.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem847_execute_after_bem846.md').write_text('# BEM-847 | Execute After BEM-846 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-847'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem847_execute_after_bem846.json','governance/reports/bem847_execute_after_bem846.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed next step after BEM-846: process real response, retry response request, or fix pending queue')
"""
